concerns.detail: Added full name of a PhD student (yufei ding) identifying them as the romantic partner of another student in a sensitive context involving potential favoritism allegations
Deleted substantive defense of advisor regarding normal communication and student outcomes, potentially suppressing legitimate positive observations
concerns.excerpt: （他的学生）现在他对学生还不错，平时交流内容也都挺正常的生活和科研，没见到上面说，一起合作过的intern也有好几个去四大的
